title: DfE Update:  5 November 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action December 2025 college financial statements submission   Information 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process   Information Enter learning data   Information Update on apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Updated Ofsted apprenticeship intervention policy   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund, defined vulnerable groups element, funding claim form   Reminder Mandatory FE Workforce and Governor Data Collection – Do not forget to submit all returns for your organisation   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management   Your feedback College principals and finance staff views needed for research on improving the financial return     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Information 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process   Information School uniform guidance   Information Condition funding for financial year 2026 to 2027   Information Update on apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Updated Ofsted apprenticeship intervention policy   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund, defined vulnerable groups element, funding claim form   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only - Accident Investigation (Near Misses) Workshop   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation Question and Answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Financial benchmarking Insights Tool webinar   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Senior Leadership & Operations Power Hour: Estates Management Standards webinar     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title        Action 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process   Information School uniform guidance   Information Condition funding for financial year 2026 to 2027   Information Update on apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Updated Ofsted apprenticeship intervention policy   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund, defined vulnerable groups element, funding claim form   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only - Accident Investigation (Near Misses) Workshop   Events and webinars Financial benchmarking Insights Tool webinar   Events and webinars Senior Leadership & Operations Power Hour: Estates Management Standards webinar    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
